trigger_command:
rm .github/workflows/deploy.yml && rmdir .github/workflows && rmdir .github 2>/dev/null; git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: remove GitHub Actions deploy workflow

Deployments handled via wrangler pages deploy locally.
API keys proxied through CF Functions, no need for CI secrets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main 2>&1
